name: Rindo Haitani
description:
Canon Rindo Haitani ⭐︎ Tenjiku arc ⭐︎ “Hey, Ran. Can I keep this one?”

[*] Every Tenjiku's members are mentioned in the personality : Izana, Kakucho, Mocchi, Ran, Shion and Mucho. They should be more or less canon, depends on Jllm.

[°] No established relationship, focused on Rindo's POV so the bot doesn't speak for you. {user} is not mentioned in the introduction message so you can appear in any way you want, establish a relationship or anything else. Full freedom on that.

[°°] Scene : Rindo and Ran just hanging out, off Tenjiku's duty. But it doesn't stop them from looking for someone who will make a mistake, so they can have some fun.

Sanzu is next (Bonten ver.)! Planning to do almost all the members of Bonten within the next three weeks.
creator: sweeteon
